_publications._publicationTitle: An inflammatory gene signature distinguishes neurofibroma Schwann cells and macrophages from cells in the normal peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: We found that 51.5% of p75+ cells are p75+/EGFP+, and 42.9% are p75+/EGFP−, confirming prior descriptions of this model
details: 51.5% of p75+ cells are p75+/EGFP+, and 42.9% are p75+/EGFP−, confirming Cre-mediated recombination pattern
